articles.title: Catnip lotion as effective as Deet at repelling mosquitoes, study finds
articles.difficulty_reason: Short, clear science report with a single storyline and direct sentences; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and little background knowledge needed.

articles.title: Species’ ingenious survival strategies no match for human destruction, red list reveals
articles.difficulty_reason: Clear environmental report with moderate sentence complexity and several examples; useful B1/B2/C1 vocabulary and some science background helps.

articles.title: Forced to wait his turn, Marine Le Pen's deputy Bardella returns to the shadows
articles.difficulty_reason: Analytical political profile with long, layered sentences and dense French-politics background; B2/C1/C2 vocabulary and prior context needed.
